title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 18 2025
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Bulker Values firming across the board this week, owing to improved freight ratesand sales of vessels such as Kmarin Oslo and Achilles Bulker
Capesize BC Mount Song (180,200 DWT, Mar 2010, Koyo Dock) sold SS/DD due to Far Eastern buyers for USD 27 mil, VV Value USD 27.57 mil. Kamsarmax BC Energy Hope (82,100 DWT, Feb 2012, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold DD Passed to Unknown Greek buyers for USD 17 mil, VV Value USD 17.79 mil
Handy BC Achilles Bulker (32,700 DWT, Oct 2003, Kanda) sold to Lebanese buyers for USD 6.6 mil, VV Value USD 6.22 mil
Handy BC (Open Hatch) Seastar Merlin (39,800 DWT, May 2025, Naikai) sold to South Korean buyers for USD 34 mil, VV Value USD 34.13 mil
Tankers: Tanker values have remained stable on a negative trend over the last week with a number of smaller, clean vessels sold to unknown Chinese buyers. VLCC Australis (299,100 DWT, Nov 2003, Universal) sold for USD 28 mil to SEACON trading as an FSU w/out BWTS, VV value USD 33.14 mil.
